questions: zero waste lifestyle kivabe follow korbo?
zero waste living shuru korbo kivabe?
answers: Zero waste is a philosophy and lifestyle that aims to send nothing to landfills by reducing consumption, reusing items, recycling, and composting. The goal is to minimize all waste.
Zero waste holo kono kichu landfill e na pathano. Reduce, reuse, recycle, compost — ei steps follow kore waste almost zero te anano jai.
Start your zero waste journey with simple steps: carry reusable bags and bottles, avoid single-use plastics, compost food scraps, buy in bulk, and choose products with minimal packaging.
Zero waste doesn't mean producing absolutely no waste — it's about making conscious choices to drastically reduce waste. Even small changes like refusing straws and carrying your own cup help.
